// // This module decrements a 3-bit binary counter on the positive edge of the clock signal. The counter resets to seven when the reset input is activated. It counts from 7 to 0 and wraps around to 7 after reaching the minimum value of 0 (000 in binary).
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [2:0] count
);always @(posedge clk, posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 3'b0;
        end else begin
            if (count == 3'b111) begin
                count <= 3'b0;
            end else begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
